ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ant_types" (
  "ant_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ant type */,
  "ant_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ant type (e.g., Worker ants, Soldier ants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ant type */,
  "average_lifespan" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the ant type in days */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Size range of the ant type (e.g., 1-2 mm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ant_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "attacker_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attacking ant type */,
  "defender_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defending ant type */,
  "ratio" TEXT /* Ratio of attackers to defenders required to neutralize the defender */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction data was recorded */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  "environment_conditions" TEXT /* Environmental conditions during the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ant_interactions_attacker_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("attacker_type_id") REFERENCES ant_types ("ant_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ant_interactions_defender_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("defender_type_id") REFERENCES ant_types ("ant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colonies" (
  "colony_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each colony */,
  "colony_name" TEXT /* Name of the colony */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the colony */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the colony was established */,
  "colony_size" INTEGER /* Total number of ants in the colony */,
  "colony_structure" TEXT /* Structure of the colony */,
  "colony_status" TEXT /* Current status of the colony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("colony_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colony_composition" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composition entry */,
  "colony_id" INTEGER /* ID of the colony */,
  "ant_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ant type */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Population count of the ant type in the colony */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the composition was last updated */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of the ant type population in the colony */,
  "last_observation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last observation of the ant type population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colony_composition_colony_id FOREIGN KEY ("colony_id") REFERENCES colonies ("colony_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colony_composition_ant_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("ant_type_id") REFERENCES ant_types ("ant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conflicts" (
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conflict */,
  "attacking_colony_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attacking colony */,
  "defending_colony_id" INTEGER /* ID of the defending colony */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the conflict started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the conflict ended */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the conflict */,
  "conflict_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the conflict */,
  "conflict_intensity" INTEGER /* Intensity of the conflict on a scale from 1 to 10 */,
  "conflict_terrain" TEXT /* Terrain where the conflict took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conflict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_defending_colony_id FOREIGN KEY ("defending_colony_id") REFERENCES colonies ("colony_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflicts_attacking_colony_id FOREIGN KEY ("attacking_colony_id") REFERENCES colonies ("colony_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conflict_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant entry */,
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflict */,
  "ant_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ant type participating in the conflict */,
  "num_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants of the ant type in the conflict */,
  "participation_role" TEXT /* Role of the ant type in the conflict */,
  "participation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of participation in the conflict in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflict_participants_conflict_id FOREIGN KEY ("conflict_id") REFERENCES conflicts ("conflict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflict_participants_ant_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("ant_type_id") REFERENCES ant_types ("ant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conflict_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome entry */,
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflict */,
  "ant_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ant type */,
  "num_survivors" INTEGER /* Number of survivors of the ant type */,
  "num_casualties" INTEGER /* Number of casualties of the ant type */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Survival rate of the ant type */,
  "casualty_rate" REAL /* Casualty rate of the ant type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflict_outcomes_ant_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("ant_type_id") REFERENCES ant_types ("ant_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conflict_outcomes_conflict_id FOREIGN KEY ("conflict_id") REFERENCES conflicts ("conflict_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or research group the researcher belongs to */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Specific focus or area of research of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the data */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in minutes */,
  "data_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of data accessed in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colony_environment" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment entry */,
  "colony_id" INTEGER /* ID of the colony */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Average temperature in the colony's environment */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity in the colony's environment */,
  "food_sources" TEXT /* List of food sources available in the colony's environment */,
  "predators" TEXT /* List of predators in the colony's environment */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the colony's environment */,
  "water_sources" TEXT /* Sources of water available in the colony's environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colony_environment_colony_id FOREIGN KEY ("colony_id") REFERENCES colonies ("colony_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colony_behavior" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior entry */,
  "colony_id" INTEGER /* ID of the colony */,
  "behavior_type" TEXT /* Type of observed behavior */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the behavior */,
  "last_observed" TEXT /* Date the behavior was last observed */,
  "behavior_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the observed behavior in minutes */,
  "behavior_context" TEXT /* Context in which the behavior was observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colony_behavior_colony_id FOREIGN KEY ("colony_id") REFERENCES colonies ("colony_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colony_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction entry */,
  "colony_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first colony involved in the interaction */,
  "colony_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second colony involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in minutes */,
  "interaction_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colony_interactions_colony_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("colony_id_1") REFERENCES colonies ("colony_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_colony_interactions_colony_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("colony_id_2") REFERENCES colonies ("colony_id")
)
